input_text: The cat sat on the mat and purred. Earth contains Europe. The big mouse is strong. Tom opened the door and the window. No penguin can fly. The bike is small. A coffee cup broke. If X1 is a father of Y1 and Y1 is a father of Z1, X1 is a grandfather of Z1. A surgeon, Dr. Smith, entered the room. Sue is a true patriot. The city was destroyed. The brother of the friend of Eve arrived. Mr Dursley is an American. The stone was heavy. Bears do not eat berries in a forest. The elephant was cool. Catholics can not disappear. John was nice and defeated. The red straw is 10 meters long. Anna handed Mark a key. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Mike or Mickey is not female. A village road was narrow. The street is in Tallinn. The teacher showed a map to the students. The letter was written. Winona is a sheep. Mary visited London in September. The woman holding a lamp sang. The tree was cut by the farmer. Amazon's length is 20 kilometers. The book was read by Sara. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Bears eat berries in a forest?
